verdict.answer_first: A: "Default to a monorepo" is the actionable answer in sentence 1; B also starts with "default recommendation is a monorepo" but dilutes it with "depends".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder: "What I'd actually do: one repo"; B adds a longer option framework with "Split them if two or more".
verdict.actionability: A gives the savable prescription: "one repo, three top-level service directories plus a shared package, per-service deploy pipelines".
